caption: In a sports stadium with red seating, a man in a white shirt is being interviewed while seated. He holds a microphone and speaks toward another person who is partially visible. Nearby, a man in a blue suit and face mask stands watching, while a person in a green athletic jacket stands with their back to the camera. In the background, another person wearing a blue and yellow vest stands near the seating. A red barrier separates the interview area from the stands, featuring a white logo. On-screen text appears at the bottom, stating "00:03" on the left and providing subtitles. The text "El Real Madrid se ha vuelto a imponer aquí, Real Madrid won here again," is visible across the first three frames. In the final frame, the text changes to include "en un campo muy complicado. at a very difficult ground:". The people remain in similar positions throughout the sequence.
